title: crinitaria asperella
intro: Crinitaria asperella, also known as the lesser stick-tongue or woolly tongue, is a plant species native to Africa. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Crinitaria asperella is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
